pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve compatibility issues between Lombok and MapStruct.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a newer version compatible with Java 21.
Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the modern release flag.
Add lombok-mapstruct-binding to the annotation processor paths to ensure it runs during compilation.

src/main/java/com/warehouse/mapper/Payme.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/com/warehouse/mapper/Payme.why_exists: List.get(0) is deprecated for removal in Java 21; using it may cause compile-time deprecation warnings or errors depending on compiler settings, and List.getFirst() is the preferred API.

src/main/java/com/warehouse/service/Paym.general_idea: Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.

src/test/java/com/warehouse/repository/D.general_idea: Replace legacy List.get(0) call with the Java 21 List.getFirst() method for improved readability.

src/test/java/com/warehouse/repository/R.general_idea: Replace legacy List.get(0) call with the Java 21 List.getFirst() convenience method.
